title: FrameworkManifest
description: Project-level declaration for adopting the framework layer.

framework_version.description: Framework version adopted by this project (e.g., '0.1').

protocol_version.description: Protocol version this framework is based on.

default_deny.description: If true, any operation not explicitly allowed in AgentBoundary is denied.

protected_scope.description: Paths monitored by RuntimeGuard. workspace_manifest includes these, does not exclude them.

guard_workspace_excludes.description: Directories excluded from workspace_manifest scanning. Directory-level only, no file extension wildcards.
